overlay_content.name: Overlay Content
overlay_content.value: Genuine Nissan Accessories are custom-fit & durability-tested for your KICKS. [*] Images shown for illustrative purposes only. For complete limited warranty details, see your Nissan dealer and read the vehicle’s Warranty Information Booklet.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
KICKS EXTERIOR ACCESSORIES

Make it your own

Stand out with a wide array of accessories that put your sense of style on display and help guard against the unexpected. Your KICKS can be equipped with many available accessories, such as Roof Rail Crossbars, Black Aluminum Alloy Wheels, and a Black Rear Bumper Protector.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
19" Dark Gray Aluminum-Alloy Wheels

  • Roll with some attitude. Add these unique 19" alloy wheels
  • Split multi-spoke design with recessed lug nuts

MSRP $620 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Exterior Ground Lighting w/ Logo

  • Just click for a sense of security with lights that brighten up the area beneath and around your vehicle
  • LED lights between front and rear tires
  • Goes on when you press the key fob, press the entry button, or open doors
  • Fades in and out with the dome light

MSRP $590 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

View Item

html_content.value:
Black Roof Rail Crossbars

  • You can add roof rail attachments and increase your cargo-carrying options when you get Roof Rail Crossbars [*] Genuine Nissan Accessory Roof Rail Crossbars have a maximum weight limit of 100 lbs. [*] Cargo and load capacity limited by weight and distribution. Always secure cargo. Heavy loading of the vehicle with cargo, especially on the roof, will affect the handling and stability of the vehicle.
  • Perfect for mounting a variety of Affiliated: Yakima® Accessories [*] Accessories shown are not genuine Nissan parts/accessories. Not warranted by Nissan. Refer to product manufacturer for warranty details. KICKS INTERIOR, PET, LIGHTING AND TECH ACCESSORIES

Gear up for every drive

Showcase your creativity with a wide array of accessories. Take the time to choose pieces that best express your personality.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
Panoramic Illuminated Headliner

  • Hidden white LEDs illuminate the headliner area around the panoramic moonroof
  • Easily control on/off function with a single button
  • Works with the vehicle’s interior lighting when the door is opened

MSRP $460 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

html_content.value:
Dual Camera Drive Recorder

  • Points forward to capture what is in front of the vehicle, points to the inside to catch what happens in the cabin [*] Driving Recorder to be used only in accordance with any laws or rules in effect in your vehicle’s location that may apply to audio or video recordings of drivers and passengers. [*] Vehicle shown is for illustrative purposes only. Not representative of named model year / model.
  • G-sensor can turn on the interior camera in case of break-in
  • Saves footage that can be shared with insurance, police, or family members
